summary: Exely Channel Manager Versioning, WSSE Hardening & Provider Lineage Tests - All 37 backend tests pass (23 new + 14 existing). Frontend /exely page verified with all 5 tabs, connection form, and 'Bagli Degil' badge. Unit tests validate: 1) SOAP XML builder with wsu:Timestamp + wsse:Nonce + PasswordText type + mustUnderstand=1, 2) Payload hash determinism (same payload = same hash, key order independent), 3) Exely normalizer outputs provider_last_modified_at, provider_created_at, provider_version, 4) HotelRunner normalizer outputs same lineage fields with updated_at/modified_at fallback.
critical_code_review_comments: soap_builder.py: WSSE Security header correctly implements wsu:Timestamp (Created + Expires 5min TTL), wsse:Nonce with 16-byte random Base64Binary, Password with PasswordText type, mustUnderstand=1 on Security element

common_ingest.py: _compute_payload_hash uses json.dumps(sort_keys=True) for deterministic hashing, truncates SHA256 to 16 chars. check_idempotency compares provider_last_modified_at timestamps for stale/newer detection and payload_hash for duplicate detection
exely/normalizer.py: Outputs provider_last_modified_at from 'last_modify', provider_created_at from 'create_date', provider_version=1
hotelrunner_ingest.py: Outputs provider_last_modified_at from 'updated_at' with 'modified_at' fallback, provider_created_at from 'created_at', provider_version=1

common_ingest.py process_reservation: Stores source_provider, provider_event_id, provider_version, provider_last_modified_at, provider_payload_hash, confidence_score fields for cross-provider reconciliation readiness
seed_data_creation: Created test room mappings via POST /api/channel-manager/exely/room-mappings with TEST_ prefix (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 adds versioning and WSSE hardening. All unit tests verify: 1) SOAP XML structure with Timestamp/Nonce/Password elements, 2) payload hash determinism, 3) provider lineage fields in both Exely and HotelRunner normalizers. External SOAP calls to Exely will fail (no real server - expected). All API endpoints continue working after common_ingest.py changes.

tests_executed.existing_api_tests: All 14 tests from test_exely_api.py continue to pass

mocked_apis_note: Exely external SOAP API is NOT mocked. Real calls to https://www.exely.com/ota/OTA will fail (expected - no real server). Internal unit tests and MongoDB operations are fully tested.
